input_roles.edit_target_image: Provides subject, composition and scene facts.
input_roles.style_reference_or_text: Provides painting, photography, material, color, era or atmosphere style.

critical_requirements: Do not copy concrete people, text, logos or unrelated scene facts from the style reference.
Subject face, hair, costume silhouette, key props, scene structure and composition must not drift.
negative_constraints: do not change subject identity or composition facts
do not copy unrelated subjects from style reference
no over-redraw, face drift or text gibberish

prompt_assembly.final_prompt_template: Transfer the visual language from style_reference_or_text onto edit_target_image while preserving subject identity, composition, scene facts, pose relationships and main object positions. Additional requirements: <user_desc>.
